title: Sweet Kicked Filipino Grape leaves Halo-Halo
description: A unique and refreshing dessert originating from the Philippines, featuring grape leaves, miso-marinate, and a variety of sweet ingredients, perfect for warm weather and special occasions.

ingredients.name: Miso paste
ingredients.notes: White or yellow miso, depending on personal preference.

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: Granulated sugar for marinating the grape leaves.

ingredients.name: Evaporated milk
ingredients.notes: Sweetened or unsweetened, depending on personal preference.

ingredients.name: Ice cream
ingredients.notes: Coconut or any other flavor of choice.

ingredients.name: Lychee fruit
ingredients.notes: Canned or fresh, depending on availability.

ingredients.name: Jackfruit
ingredients.notes: Canned or fresh, depending on availability.

ingredients.name: Ube halaya
ingredients.notes: Filipino ube jam for added flavor and color.

ingredients.name: Red mung bean
ingredients.notes: Cooked or canned, depending on availability.

instructions: Soak grape leaves in a brine solution of 1 cup sugar and 1 cup water for at least 30 minutes.
